Class DiscordClient

java.lang.Object
dev.chojo.aether.discordoauth.service.DiscordClient
public class DiscordClient extends Object
Client for interacting with the Discord API.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    DiscordClient(DiscordOAuth configuration)
    Creates a new Discord client.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Connection>
    connections(OAuthToken token)
    Fetches the user's third-party connections.

    Fetches the user's member information for a specific guild.

    Fetches the user's guilds.

    Fetches the current user's information.

    Methods inherited from class Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • DiscordClient

      public DiscordClient(DiscordOAuth configuration)
      Creates a new Discord client.
      Parameters:
      configuration - The Discord OAuth configuration

  • Method Details

    • user

      public DiscordUser user(OAuthToken token)
      Fetches the current user's information.

      Requires the OAuthScope.IDENTIFY scope. If the OAuthScope.EMAIL scope is provided, the email field will be populated.

      Parameters:
      token - The access token
      Returns:
      The user's information

    • guilds

      public List<DiscordGuild> guilds(OAuthToken token)
      Fetches the user's guilds.

      Requires the OAuthScope.GUILDS scope.

      Parameters:
      token - The access token to use for the request
      Returns:
      A list of the user's guilds, or an empty list if the scope is missing.

    • connections

      public List<Connection> connections(OAuthToken token)
      Fetches the user's third-party connections.

      Requires the OAuthScope.CONNECTIONS scope.

      Parameters:
      token - The access token to use for the request
      Returns:
      A list of the user's connections, or an empty list if the scope is missing.

    • joinGuild

      public Member joinGuild(JoinGuildData data, OAuthToken token, String botToken, long guildId) throws IOException, InterruptedException
      Joins a user to a guild.

      Requires the OAuthScope.GUILDS_JOIN scope.

      Parameters:
      data - Data to join guild with
      token - The user's access token
      botToken - Bot token for authorization
      guildId - ID of the guild to join
      Throws:
      IOException
      InterruptedException

    • guildMember

      public Member guildMember(OAuthToken token, long guildId) throws IOException, InterruptedException
      Fetches the user's member information for a specific guild.

      Requires the OAuthScope.GUILDS_MEMBERS_READ scope.

      Parameters:
      token - The user's access token
      guildId - ID of the guild
      Returns:
      The member information, or null if the scope is missing or the user is not in the guild.
      Throws:
      IOException - If the request fails
      InterruptedException - If the request is interrupted
